query:
SELECT
            m.id,
            m.thread_id,
            m.provider_thread_id,
            m.headers_jsonb,
            m.is_sent,
            m.is_draft
        FROM email_messages m
        WHERE m.link_id = $1
          AND m.is_draft = true
          AND jsonb_path_exists(
              m.headers_jsonb,
              '$[*] ? (@."Macro-In-Reply-To" == $macro_uuid)'::jsonpath,
              jsonb_build_object('macro_uuid', $2::text)
          )
        ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
        LIMIT 1
